title: phyllanthus lasiogynus
intro: Phyllanthus lasiogynus, also known as the Lasiogynous Phyllanthus or Lasiogynus, is a plant species in the family Phyllanthaceae. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating various infections, and supporting liver health. Phyllanthus lasiogynus is often prepared as a decoction, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal uses.
